title: armeria villosa subsp. villosa
intro: Armeria villosa subsp. villosa, also known as the hairy thrift or woolly thrift, is a perennial plant species in the plantain family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include soothing sore throats, relieving congestion, and reducing fever. Armeria villosa subsp. villosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
